report.summary: Cycle 2 standup: market green (BTC $68,688 +1.94%, ETH $2,133 +3.75%, SOL $83.86 +1.08%) but F&G stuck at 8 Extreme Fear. 433 uncommitted files — Day 7 without deploy remains the existential P0. No progress on any v1 priorities.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: $68,688.20 (+1.94% 24h) — up ~$150–$976 from v1 standup ($67,712–$68,534). Holding solidly above $68K. Recovery trend intact but still down ~24% YTD for Q1 close.
ETH: $2,133.05 (+3.75% 24h) — up ~$25 from v1 standup ($2,108). ETH showing relative strength vs BTC today, reclaiming $2,130 level. Still down ~60% YTD.
SOL: $83.86 (+1.08% 24h) — newly tracked this cycle. Down ~72% YTD. Low volatility session.

F&G INDEX: 8 (Extreme Fear) — UNCHANGED from v1. Now 54+ day streak in Extreme Fear. Price-sentiment divergence continues: market green, fear accelerating. Historically, readings this low correlate with local bottoms.

DELTA FROM V1 STANDUP (same day): BTC +$150–$976. ETH +$25. SOL now tracked. F&G unchanged at 8. Uncommitted files 432→433 (+1). Page.tsx count flat at 1,235. No new publishes. Global crypto market cap ~$2.42T.
GSC/TRAFFIC GAP: Still no direct GSC access from sandbox. 3-day gap (Mar 30–31) in analytics coverage remains unrecovered. Any traffic movements during the deploy drought are untracked.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: This is the 2nd standup of Apr 1. Only 1 prior report exists today (v1 standup). No build, publish, design, community, or eod cycles have run yet today.
V1 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Emergency deploy 433 files — NOT DONE, now +1 file. (2) Q1 retrospective content — NOT STARTED. (3) Resume full agent rotation — PARTIAL (only 2 standups so far).

BLOCKERS (UNCHANGED): P0 — 433 uncommitted files, Day 7 since last deploy (Mar 25, 21aaf5b). P1 — 2 blocked queue items (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking missing page.tsx). P2 — ~105 legacy slugs missing page.tsx. P3 — 147+ TS errors. P3 — CoinGecko rate limit risk.

GIT STATUS: 433 files pending. 31 files changed in tracked diff (992 insertions, 595 deletions). Major changes in published-pages.ts (+160 lines), NotificationCenter.tsx refactor, learn page data updates. All invisible to production.
RISK: Every hour without deploy = lost indexing for 77+ published slugs, 14+ learn pages, 6+ OG images, UX fixes. Compounding SEO debt is now 7 days deep.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — EMERGENCY DEPLOY [DAY 7 — UNCHANGED]: 433 uncommitted files. This has been P0 across 6+ standup reports. Jefe action required: `git add -A && git commit -m 'batch deploy' && git push`. Every additional cycle without deploy compounds indexing debt. The 160-line published-pages.ts update alone unlocks dozens of pages for Google.

PRIORITY 2 — Q1 RETROSPECTIVE CONTENT (WINDOW CLOSING): April 1 is the ideal publish date for 'Q1 2026 Crypto Market Recap'. BTC -24% YTD, ETH -60%, SOL -72%, F&G at 8. High-intent search traffic window is open NOW but decays rapidly. Build cycle should produce this page today.

PRIORITY 3 — RUN FULL 6-AGENT ROTATION: Only 2 standup runs today. Need build cycle to produce content, publish cycle to clear queue, design for OG images, community for social presence, and EOD QA. 3-day gap means significant catch-up needed.

report.email: SKIPPED — api.resend.com blocked from browser (CORS/Failed to fetch). Same sandbox egress limitation as all previous cycles. Manual send or server-side relay needed.
